name: Straight Bar Low Pulley Cable Curl

instructions.starting position: Stand in front of the cable machine, legs shoulder width apart, and grasp the straight bar with an underhand (supinated) grip and your hands about shoulder width apart.
instructions.execution: Keeping your body fixed, elbow tucked in at your side, and eyes facing forward, slowly curl the weight up as far as possible without letting the elbow move forward excessively; only your forearms should be moving. Squeeze the biceps at the top of the movement, and then slowly lower the weight back to the starting position. Repeat for desired reps.
